Class AbbrevMap

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.AbbrevMap
@NullMarked public class AbbrevMap extends Object
This class realizes a 1:1 map for term abbreviations. A term abbreviation is a label for a (complex) term structure that should be used for pretty printing instead. Abbreviations are also supported during parsing. Use @label to access to a previous defined abbreviation with label label.

    Description

    Creates a AbbrevMap.

    addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
    Register a PropertyChangeListener to be notified on abbrevation changes

    Changes the abbreviation of t to abbreviation.

    Changes the abbreviation abbreviation to t.
    boolean

    Returns true if the map contains the abbreviation s.
    boolean
    containsTerm(JTerm t)
    Returns true if the map contains the term t.
    Set<Map.Entry<JTerm,String>>
    export()
    Exports the current abbreviation map as an entry set.
    void
    forcePut(String abbreviation, JTerm t)
    Sets the given abbreviation to term without checking of previous assignment.
    @Nullable String
    getAbbrev(JTerm t)
    Returns the abbreviation mapped to the term t.
    @Nullable JTerm
    getTerm(String s)
    Returns the term which is mapped to the abbreviation s, null if no term is mapped to the abbreviation.
    boolean
    isEnabled(JTerm t)
    Returns true if the mapping is enabled, which means that the abbreviation may be used.
    void

    Associates a Term and its abbreviation in this map.
    void
    remove(JTerm term)
    Removes the given term and its abbreviation completely from the underlying data structures.
    void
    removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
    Deregister a PropertyChangeListener to be notified on abbrevation changes
    void
    setEnabled(JTerm t, boolean enabled)
    Sets the mapping of the term t to its abbreviation enabled or disabled.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbbrevMap

      public AbbrevMap()
      Creates a AbbrevMap.

  • Method Details

    • put

      public void put(JTerm t, String abbreviation, boolean enabled) throws AbbrevException
      Associates a Term and its abbreviation in this map.
      Parameters:
      t - a term
      abbreviation - the abbreviation for of this term
      enabled - true if the abbreviation should be used (e.g., when printing the term), false otherwise.
      Throws:
      AbbrevException

    • changeAbbrev

      public void changeAbbrev(JTerm t, String abbreviation) throws AbbrevException
      Changes the abbreviation of t to abbreviation. If the AbbrevMap doesn't contain t, nothing happens.
      Throws:
      AbbrevException - when the abbreviation is already in use.

    • changeAbbrev

      public void changeAbbrev(String abbreviation, JTerm t, boolean enabled) throws AbbrevException
      Changes the abbreviation abbreviation to t. If the AbbrevMap doesn't contain abbreviation nothing happens.
      Throws:
      AbbrevException - when an abbreviation for t already exists.

    • containsAbbreviation

      public boolean containsAbbreviation(String s)
      Returns true if the map contains the abbreviation s.

    • containsTerm

      public boolean containsTerm(JTerm t)
      Returns true if the map contains the term t.

    • getTerm

      public @Nullable JTerm getTerm(String s)
      Returns the term which is mapped to the abbreviation s, null if no term is mapped to the abbreviation.

    • getAbbrev

      public @Nullable String getAbbrev(JTerm t)
      Returns the abbreviation mapped to the term t.
      Returns:
      null if no abbreviation is mapped to t.

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled(JTerm t)
      Returns true if the mapping is enabled, which means that the abbreviation may be used.

    • setEnabled

      public void setEnabled(JTerm t, boolean enabled)
      Sets the mapping of the term t to its abbreviation enabled or disabled.
      Parameters:
      t - a JTerm
      enabled - true if the abbreviation of t may be used.

    • export

      public Set<Map.Entry<JTerm,String>> export()
      Exports the current abbreviation map as an entry set.

    • remove

      public void remove(JTerm term)
      Removes the given term and its abbreviation completely from the underlying data structures.

    • forcePut

      public void forcePut(String abbreviation, JTerm t)
      Sets the given abbreviation to term without checking of previous assignment. The abbreviation is set to be enabled.
      Parameters:
      abbreviation - the label of the abbreviation
      t - a term

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Register a PropertyChangeListener to be notified on abbrevation changes

    • removePropertyChangeListener

      public void removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Deregister a PropertyChangeListener to be notified on abbrevation changes
